summary: Good‑sound soundboard recording but suffers from tracking errors that mislabel the China Cat track and shift the US Blues encore to the end of Set 1.
review: The FLAC capture delivers very clear, high‑quality audio typical of a soundboard source, though the reviewer notes a serious tracking issue—track 11 is mislabeled as "China Cat" when it’s actually the US Blues encore, which was placed at the end of Set 1 to fit on two discs. The performance itself isn’t discussed, so listeners should expect solid sound but be aware of the song‑order anomaly.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it praises the audio quality but flags a significant tracking problem, leading to an overall moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and well‑balanced sound, but tracking is off—track titles misaligned ("China Cat" actually US Blues) and encore moved to end of Set 1.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Encore was placed at the end of Set 1 to fit onto two discs, resulting in an unconventional set flow.
